help
start
stop
run
integrate
print
init
set 
list
show
del
sphere
plane
aabb
fixed
add sphere
add aabb
add plane
set dt
set gravity
step
reset
quit
exit
q
set obj 1 fixed 1
h
set obj 0 fixed 1
show 1
set obj 1 size 1
set obj 1 size 1 1 1
set obj 0 fixed 0
set obj 0 size 10 10 0
set obj 1 pos 0 0 10
set obj 0 fixed true
add sphere 
add plane 
set obj 1 fixed true
set obj 0 name ground
set obj 1 mass 5
start 
add sphere sphere
add plane ground
set obj 0 fixed trueq
